answer:
The Podio MCP server is a standardized integration that allows AI assistants—such as ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Claude, and Cursor—to read and write data directly within your Podio workspaces using natural language [1]. By implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP), it enables AI agents to browse organizations, manage tasks, and update Podio items through 22 distinct tools [1].

You can connect by pointing your AI platform to the official server URL at https://mcp.podio.com/mcp [1]. For testing, the server supports shared default credentials; however, for production, it is recommended to use your own Podio API key for better control and reliability [1]. Alternatively, third-party services like Zapier, viaSocket, and Latenode provide their own MCP endpoints to connect Podio with broader integration ecosystems [2][3][4].
